name: Marriott Bonvoy Bold® Credit Card
title: Marriott Bonvoy Bold® Credit Card (Chase)
text: Card: Marriott Bonvoy Bold® Credit Card (Chase) BEST NO ANNUAL FEE MARRIOTT CARD Pros: 5 elite night every calendar year,Automatic Marriott Bonvoy Silver status,Baggage delay insurance,Lost luggage reimbursement,Trip delay reimbursement coverage Cons: There are better Marriott cards if you want higher tier status or benefits,Limited annual elite night credits Why we chose it: If you’re new to travel rewards, the Marriott Bonvoy Bold Card is a solid, low-risk option that allows you to earn a decent number of points on everyday purchases. Some of this card's best perks are automatic Silver Elite Status, travel delay insurance, baggage insurance and purchase protections. (Partner offer) Who it's good for: Travelers looking to start out with Marriott as one of their first hotel loyalty programs will find a lot of benefits to enjoy with this card. Since it charges no annual fee there is little to no risk about not using its benefits enough to justify carrying it. Though this credit card doesn’t carry nearly as many perks as other Marriott cards, it does come with Silver Elite status and standard purchase and travel protections.   Annual fee: $0 Rewards: 1 - 14X points Intro bonus: Earn 2 Free Night Awards after spending $1,000 on eligible purchases within 3 months of account opening with the Marriott Bonvoy Bold® Credit Card. Redeem your Free Night Awards for a one-night stay at properties with a redemption level up to 50,000 points per night, a total value of 100,000 points. Certain hotels have resort fees. Points valuation: 0.7 Limited time: Last Chance APR: 19.24% - 27.74% Variable,19.24% - 27.74% Variable,28.49% Variable,Up to 29.99% Benefits: Reimburses you for essential purchases like toiletries and clothing for baggage delays over 6 hours by passenger carrier up to $100 a day for 5 days. If you or an immediate family member check or carry on luggage that is damaged or lost by the carrier, you're covered up to $3,000 per passenger. If your common carrier travel is delayed more than 12 hours or requires an overnight stay, you and your family are covered for unreimbursed expenses, such as meals and lodging, up to $500 per ticket. Covers your new purchases for 120 days against damage or theft up to $500 per claim and $50,000 per account. Get one-year complimentary DashPass, a membership for both DoorDash and Caviar that provides unlimited deliveries with $0 delivery fees and lower service fees on eligible orders. Enjoy Automatic Silver Elite Status with Marriott Bonvoy that renews each account anniversary year with benefits like Priority Late Checkout (where available) & 10% More Points on Stays at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy Receive 5 Elite Night Credits every calendar year. Transfer partners: This card earns Chase points Review: https://thepointsguy.com/guide/marriott-bonvoy-bold-credit-card-review/
